description_long: This bungalow features a modern, minimalist design with a large, flat, overhanging roof and clean geometric lines. The structure is surrounded on three sides by a dense border of stylized trees or shrubbery, creating a sense of privacy and enclosure. The front facade includes a prominent staircase leading up to a covered entryway, with a raised platform and a shaded porch area. Large windows are visible on the sides, allowing for ample natural light and views of the surrounding landscape. The exterior appears to be constructed from a combination of concrete, glass, and wood, with a sleek, dark roof contrasting against lighter walls. The rear of the property includes an open patio or terrace area, partially enclosed by the tree border.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a shaded porch, and a surrounding border of dense trees. The design emphasizes clean lines, privacy, and integration with the landscape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, staircase, and covered porch, with the tree border forming a backdrop.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended roof, large side windows, and the open terrace area at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back platform, more of the tree enclosure, and the bungalow's linear form.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side windows, roof overhang, and the patio area adjacent to the tree border.
